title: where did you find out about monday.com
excerpt:
Hey, 
I’ve been using monday.com for a year now, I’m super happy. I found out about this CRM by accident while reading https://crmexpert.pl/ blog. I’m curious how it was for you, how did you find out about this CRM? Did …

posts.author: pola777 (Pola)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
I’ve been using monday.com for a year now, I’m super happy. I found out about this CRM by accident while reading https://crmexpert.pl/ blog. I’m curious how it was for you, how did you find out about this CRM? Did a friend recommend it to you? Or did you find out about it from an article on the blog?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pola777,

Great to hear you’ve been enjoying monday.com—it’s such a versatile tool! For me, I discovered it though there webniars when they talk about new products / features (https://monday.com/whats-new)

How about you—what’s been your favorite feature so far? Do you have any other good knowledge sources?

I love the free Mutherboard Campus training! There team are so friendly Mutherboard
